TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Yada Yuichi == Kapatayan romi'ad ni Yada Yuichi Mifalicay to Taywan a sayho no dopoku Yada Yuichi , o nai Isikawa no Dipong a sayho no dopoku, i 1910 mihecaan tayni i Taywan, citodong to Taywan sotokufu a dopokupo a kicususa itiya. nawhani citodong cingra misalof to kasaira no liomahan a pananoman ato itiraay i Ciayi Taynan a ciris, sakamanga'ay ko pinaloma panay no Ciayi Taynan a dafdaf. O nisafacoan ningra, mafalic ko liomahan, talihoc, dopoku a tayal, ngalef o tataparan nengnengan no syakay. Tadamaanay no Dipong tayni malasayho no dopoku, padama micowat to suyli no Taywan ‚ÄãMasofoc i no Isikawakin kawakitakun ima coson (aniniay Kanazawasi Imamaci) maomahay laloma'an, o sakalalima a wawa to fa'inayan ci Yada Yuichi. Mitilid i Tokyo Tikoku daykaku Rikakupu kokakupu dopoku kokakuka, itira i, malitemoh ningra ko sakafiyol no 'orip a singsi, itira i Dipong ira ko "Kowankokaku no cici" fangcalay ngangan ci Hiroi Isami . Matengil ho ningra ko sayho no dopoku ci Aoyamashi mala dopoku a cilis no Panama cecay misolapay no Dipong, o kakeridan misolapay a tayal. ‚Äã‚ÄãO pifiyol nona tatosaay i, nai 1910 mihheca pisawad ni Yada Yuichi, manengneng ko pikilim no Dipong sotokufu to sayho no dopoku tayra mcowat to Taywan, saka makahi cingra makanir tayra i Taywan. ‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãIkor no katayra ningra i Taywan to 4 miheca, macakat mala kicususa ci Yada Yuichi. 'Ayaw noni padeteng cingra mikilim to sapisalof to liyok kanaop no nanom no Takao minato, talacowa nawhani caay kahaydaen ko takaraway yosang, nika o sapisalofaw a faloco' ato sakalaheciaw, kafoaen no kafa'eday ci Yamagata Kaname. ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãNanoya patoroden ni Yamagata Kaname to tosaay dademaken ci Yada Yuichi: sarakat, papikilimen to pakayraan no nanomay pisadingki; roma sato , misolap to Cuosoy 'alo to sakanga'ay sapananom to omah a 'acer. Nanoya, ci Yada Yuichi mikerid to kapot tayra toya maledefay no kadadengaan no lifong a lotok misolap, miteka patireng to ta'angay tayal a Ciayi Taynan a ciris. Satata'akay i Asia, sakatolo tayal no hekal, mata'elif ko 10 mihecaan romi'ad ta malaheci ‚ÄãO mimingay adihayay lotok a kanatal ko Taywan. Sadadaya' sanay a kanatal, mamoko' ko 'alo, matono', madasidas ko nanom, nai timol tala 'amis ko lotolotok sakacicawang no nanom, pasiwali ko takaraway lotolotok, orasaka dadaya' ko 'alo no kaetip, masonol ko 'asad saka ira ko masadafdafay a sera. matiya o Ciayi Taynan dafdaf manga'ay ko kaliomahen, o nga'ayay koni. ‚Äã‚ÄãTalacowa, o Ciayi Taynan a dafdaf ko kaitira, dadaya' ko pitedi no cidal to romi'ad, nika kalaorad ko kaciherangan makedal ko kasienawan, caay ka nga'ay ko sapananom to facal, orasaka citodong to "kakarayan ko pi'araw no omah" sanay a ngangan, sasowalen, ano sakaira no pilitod, minengneng ho to pipafeli no karayan a sakaciira. ‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãMasamatira, o Ciayi Taynan a dafdaf ko sakakaay tayal no Taywan sotokufu patireng to suyli a sa'etal. Itiya patodong to "liomahan Taywan, kikayan Dipong" sanay a satao', orasaka Taywan sotokufu mihapiw to "Taywan kapolongan kokyo unka kisiy", oya nano tekedan niyah a pananoman i Ciayi Taynan a dafdaf, palekapoten ko rocok, pakacisataen, palasawad to fangafang, masongila' ko sa'etal a tayal, palacecayen ko citodongay matayalay to demak, o nianan ko parana'an kadadoedo saki Ciayi Taynan a ciris nitayalan. ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãOya ci Yada Yuichi ko mapatoroday misolap patireng a kanga'ayan, malaheci ko pisolap ato sakaira no pakayraan a mikingkiw i, masapinang ni Yada Yuichi i kafafaway no 'alo no Koantien, ira ko nalacolan mimingay nisanga'an no Holan ato Mancin a suyli itiya, orasaka patireng to tata'angay pisopedan to nanom a nga'ayay kaitiraan sato. ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãI 1917 miheca, pasadak ci Yada Yuichi i Taywan sotokufu to "Kuantien 'alo suyli ciris halaka". Nikawrira o todong no yosang ko nihaenan, kalalicayen no laocan no Dipong to nia halaka i, mafo'ot aca no satakaraway citodongay to payso itiya; nika saka tosa miheca ira ko "Kacango'otan no felac" demak, takaraw ko 'aca no felac, macakat to ko li'aca no dafong, macakat ko 'aca no loma', saka masasiwtoc ko finawlan sofo itiya. orasaka, kacangalan sakaira no felac itiya, mihayda to ko sotokufu, i kasasipasasa to kihi a payso, nanoyaan sato ko "Kuantien 'alo suyli ciris halaka" a miteka matayal. ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãI 1920 miheca, o sakalaheci no pisahalaka ato pisafaco to Ciayi Taynan a ciris, miteka to midemak. Itira i kafafaw no Kuantien 'alo patireng to "Usanto satafa'", oya Usanto satafa ato Zhuoshui 'alo ko pananoman, pacomod i nitafa'an piparoan to nanom. Adihay ko 'asad no nanom i Zhuoshui 'alo, nai Cengwen 'alo pialaan, ta patireng to nanomay pisadingki, patireng to dihifay pananoman, awaayay ho manengneng a "salongan suyli satongal" sanay, malitemoh ni Yada Yuichi ko karorayan, mahacecay masalof. ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãIkor to no 10 miheca, oni a satata'akay no Asia, saka tolo ta'akay no hekal, oya satadamanay kicic pananoman sayho a dopoku, itira i 1930 miheca 4 folad 1 romi'ad malaheci to, o sa'etal no pipananom tangasa aniniay a Taynansi, Ciayisi, Caiyisien, Yinlinsien, nawhani oni a Ciayi Taynan a ciris, polong no Ciayi Taynan dafdaf mapakadofah ko panay, mapaloma ko holaymay, nai 'ayaw no semo'ot no mihecaan mapadipot ko Taywan tangasa anini. Minengneng to kakarayan a omah caay to pinengneng to kakarayan, nai Ciayi Taynan dafdaf a panay mapakaen ko Taywan tamdaw to da'oda'oc. ‚ÄãPaherek ko tayal to Ciayi Taynan a ciris itiya, malinah tayra i Taypi citodong matayal i Taywan sotokofo ci Yada Yuichi, mala citodongay to dopokuka suyliko kakeridan, citodong misolapay to kasa'alo no Taywan, padoedo micowat to suyli pananoman a demak. o nano fana' ningra ato nidemakan, nanoyaan sa mafalic konini a sera. ‚Äã‚ÄãO Ciayi Taynan a ciris, masongila' ko kafalic no Ciayi Taynan dafdaf ko kaliomahan, mapatongal to ko kamaomahan, mafalic ko harer no sera, mapatongal ko nilitodan a panay, malakanga'ayan no maomahay niyaro' ato kasangasaw, macowat ko kicay no Taywan, parapatan ato syakay, masapinang ko caay ko mamalalat a kafiyol. ‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãI 1941 miheca, miteka ko Taypinyang saka tosa lalood no hekal, o sotoko no Dipong pasitimol ko satao', mitatahidang to tadamaanay kicik patayra i Nanyo misolap, oya ci Yada Yuichi orasaka mikalic to 1942 miheca 5 folad 8 romi'ad a Tayyo maru kuruzu tamina, pasayra i Filippin misolap to kanga'ayan kaliomahan, nika oya nikdakawan a tamina mapakotang no timera no Amilika a mateneng, oya ci Yada Yuichi mapatay i papotal riyar no Nakasakiken Koshimashi itiya. oya fafahi sato ci Kome Murahoka Shironushi tadamararom ko faloco' ningra, nanoyaan sa makinapatay itira i Usanto satafa'. ‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãPitademan ca Yada Yuichi aci Kome Murahoka Shironushi itira ka'amis no pifawahan to nanom a mapatireng. ‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãSin Taywan hepin kikingkay mitliday

nitaja…æan. ****o~uja ¶i ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi ko~u mapato~uro~u…¨~…Æaj miso~u…æap patir…ô≈ã a ka≈ãa °ajan, ma…æaƒß…ô ¶i ko~u piso~u…æap ato~u sakaira no~u pakajraan a miki≈ãkiw i, masapina≈ã ni ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi i kafafawaj no~u °a…æo~u no~u ko~uanti…ôn, ira ko~u na…æa ¶o~u…æan mimi≈ãaj nisa≈ãa °an no~u ƒßo~u…æan ato~u man ¶in a so~u~uj…æi itija, o~urasaka patir…ô≈ã to~u tata °a≈ãaj piso~up…ô…¨~…Æan to~u nano~um a ≈ãa °ajaj kaitiraan sato~u. *****i **** miƒß…ô ¶a, pasa…¨~…Æak ¶i ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi i tajwan so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u to~u "ko~u~uanti…ôn °a…æo~u so~u~uj…æi ¶iris ƒßa…æaka". nikawrira o~u to~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ã no~u jo~usa≈ã ko~u niƒßa…ônan, ka…æa…æi ¶aj…ôn no~u …æao~u ¶an no~u …¨~…Æipo~u≈ã to~u nia ƒßa…æaka i, mafo~u °o~ut a ¶a no~u satakarawaj ¶ito~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ãaj to~u pajso~u itija; nika saka to~usa miƒß…ô ¶a ira ko~u "ka ¶a≈ão~u °o~utan no~u f…ô…æa ¶" …¨~…Æ…ômak, takaraw ko~u °a ¶a no~u f…ô…æa ¶, ma ¶akat to~u ko~u …æi °a ¶a no~u …¨~…Æafo~u≈ã, ma ¶akat ko~u °a ¶a no~u …æo~uma °, saka masasiwto~u ¶ ko~u finaw…æan so~ufo~u itija. o~urasaka, ka ¶a≈ãa…æan sakaira no~u f…ô…æa ¶ itija, miƒßaj…¨~…Æa to~u ko~u so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u, i kasasipasasa to~u kiƒßi a pajso~u, nano~ujaan sato~u ko~u "ko~u~uanti…ôn °a…æo~u so~u~uj…æi ¶iris ƒßa…æaka" a mit…ôka mataja…æ. ******i **** miƒß…ô ¶a, o~u saka…æaƒß…ô ¶i no~u pisaƒßa…æaka ato~u pisafa ¶o~u to~u ¶iaji tajnan a ¶iris, mit…ôka to~u mi…¨~…Æ…ômak. itira i kafafaw no~u ko~u~uanti…ôn °a…æo~u patir…ô≈ã to~u "o~u~usanto~u satafa °", o~uja o~u~usanto~u satafa ato~u *ƒßo~u~uo~usƒßo~u~ui °a…æo~u ko~u panano~uman, pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…Æ i nitafa °an piparo~uan to~u nano~um. a…¨~…Æiƒßaj ko~u °asa…¨~…Æ no~u nano~um i *ƒßo~u~uo~usƒßo~u~ui °a…æo~u, nai ¶…ô≈ãw…ôn °a…æo~u pia…æaan, ta patir…ô≈ã to~u nano~umaj pisa…¨~…Æi≈ãki, patir…ô≈ã to~u …¨~…Æiƒßifaj panano~uman, awaajaj ƒßo~u man…ô≈ãn…ô≈ã a "sa…æo~u≈ãan so~u~uj…æi sato~u≈ãa…æ" sanaj, ma…æit…ômo~uƒß ni ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi ko~u karo~urajan, maƒßa ¶…ô ¶aj masa…æo~uf. *******iko~ur to~u no~u ** miƒß…ô ¶a, o~uni a satata °akaj no~u asia, saka to~u…æo~u ta °akaj no~u ƒß…ôka…æ, o~uja sata…¨~…Æamanaj ki ¶i ¶ panano~uman sajƒßo~u a …¨~…Æo~upo~uko~u~u, itira i **** miƒß…ô ¶a * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ * ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ ma…æaƒß…ô ¶i to~u, o~u sa °…ôta…æ no~u pipanano~um ta≈ãasa aniniaj a tajnansi, ¶iajisi, ¶aijisi…ôn, jin…æinsi…ôn, nawƒßani o~uni a ¶iaji tajnan a ¶iris, po~u…æo~u≈ã no~u ¶iaji tajnan …¨~…Æaf…¨~…Æaf mapaka…¨~…Æo~ufaƒß ko~u panaj, mapa…æo~uma ko~u ƒßo~u…æajmaj, nai °ajaw no~u s…ômo~u °o~ut no~u miƒß…ô ¶aan mapa…¨~…Æipo~ut ko~u tajwan ta≈ãasa anini. min…ô≈ãn…ô≈ã to~u kakarajan a o~umaƒß ¶aaj to~u pin…ô≈ãn…ô≈ã to~u kakarajan, nai ¶iaji tajnan …¨~…Æaf…¨~…Æaf a panaj mapaka…ôn ko~u tajwan tam…¨~…Æaw to~u …¨~…Æa °o~u…¨~…Æa °o~u ¶. *paƒß…ôr…ôk ko~u taja…æ to~u ¶iaji tajnan a ¶iris itija, ma…æinaƒß tajra i tajpi ¶ito~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ã mataja…æ i tajwan so~uto~uko~ufo~u ¶i ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi, ma…æa ¶ito~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ãaj to~u …¨~…Æo~upo~uko~u~uka so~u~uj…æiko~u kak…ôri…¨~…Æan, ¶ito~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ã miso~u…æapaj to~u kasa °a…æo~u no~u tajwan, pa…¨~…Æo~u…ô…¨~…Æo~u mi ¶o~uwat to~u so~u~uj…æi panano~uman a …¨~…Æ…ômak. o~u nano~u fana ° ni≈ãra ato~u ni…¨~…Æ…ômakan, nano~ujaan sa mafa…æi ¶ ko~unini a s…ôra. **o~u ¶iaji tajnan a ¶iris, maso~u≈ãi…æa ° ko~u kafa…æi ¶ no~u ¶iaji tajnan …¨~…Æaf…¨~…Æaf ko~u ka…æio~umaƒßan, mapato~u≈ãa…æ to~u ko~u kamao~umaƒßan, mafa…æi ¶ ko~u ƒßar…ôr no~u s…ôra, mapato~u≈ãa…æ ko~u ni…æito~u…¨~…Æan a panaj, ma…æaka≈ãa °ajan no~u mao~umaƒßaj nijaro~u ° ato~u kasa≈ãasaw, ma ¶o~uwat ko~u ki ¶aj no~u tajwan, parapatan ato~u sjakaj, masapina≈ã ko~u ¶aaj ko~u mama…æa…æat a kafijo~u…æ. ***i **** miƒß…ô ¶a, mit…ôka ko~u tajpinja≈ã saka to~usa …æa…æo~uo~u…¨~…Æ no~u ƒß…ôka…æ, o~u so~uto~uko~u no~u …¨~…Æipo~u≈ã pasitimo~u…æ ko~u satao~u °, mitataƒßi…¨~…Æa≈ã to~u ta…¨~…Æamaanaj ki ¶ik patajra i nanjo~u miso~u…æap, o~uja ¶i ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi o~urasaka mika…æi ¶ to~u **** miƒß…ô ¶a * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ * ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ a tajjo~u maro~u~u ko~u~uro~u~u*o~u~u tamina, pasajra i fi…æippin miso~u…æap to~u ka≈ãa °ajan ka…æio~umaƒßan, nika o~uja nik…¨~…Æakawan a tamina mapako~uta≈ã no~u tim…ôra no~u ami…æika a mat…ôn…ô≈ã, o~uja ¶i ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi mapataj i papo~uta…æ rijar no~u nakasakik…ôn ko~usƒßimasƒßi itija. o~uja fafaƒßi sato~u ¶i ko~um…ô mo~u~uraƒßo~uka sƒßiro~uno~u~usƒßi ta…¨~…Æamararo~um ko~u fa…æo~u ¶o~u ° ni≈ãra, nano~ujaan sa makinapataj itira i o~u~usanto~u satafa °. ***pita…¨~…Æ…ôman ¶a ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi a ¶i ko~um…ô mo~u~uraƒßo~uka sƒßiro~uno~u~usƒßi itira ka °amis no~u pifawaƒßan to~u nano~um a mapatir…ô≈ã. ***sin tajwan ƒß…ôpin kiki≈ãkaj mit…æi…¨~…Æaj
S.FORM: == Yada Yuichi == Kapatayan romi'ad ni Yada Yuichi Mifalicay to Taywan a sayho no dopoku Yada Yuichi , o nai Isikawa no Dipong a sayho no dopoku, i 1910 mihecaan tayni i Taywan, citodong to Taywan sotokufu a dopokupo a kicususa itiya. nawhani citodong cingra misalof to kasaira no liomahan a pananoman ato itiraay i Ciayi Taynan a ciris, sakamanga'ay ko pinaloma panay no Ciayi Taynan a dafdaf. O nisafacoan ningra, mafalic ko liomahan, talihoc, dopoku a tayal, ngalef o tataparan nengnengan no syakay. Tadamaanay no Dipong tayni malasayho no dopoku, padama micowat to suyli no Taywan ‚ÄãMasofoc i no Isikawakin kawakitakun ima coson (aniniay Kanazawasi Imamaci) maomahay laloma'an, o sakalalima a wawa to fa'inayan ci Yada Yuichi. Mitilid i Tokyo Tikoku daykaku Rikakupu kokakupu dopoku kokakuka, itira i, malitemoh ningra ko sakafiyol no 'orip a singsi, itira i Dipong ira ko "Kowankokaku no cici" fangcalay ngangan ci Hiroi Isami . Matengil ho ningra ko sayho no dopoku ci Aoyamashi mala dopoku a cilis no Panama cecay misolapay no Dipong, o kakeridan misolapay a tayal. ‚Äã‚ÄãO pifiyol nona tatosaay i, nai 1910 mihheca pisawad ni Yada Yuichi, manengneng ko pikilim no Dipong sotokufu to sayho no dopoku tayra mcowat to Taywan, saka makahi cingra makanir tayra i Taywan. ‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãIkor no katayra ningra i Taywan to 4 miheca, macakat mala kicususa ci Yada Yuichi. 'Ayaw noni padeteng cingra mikilim to sapisalof to liyok kanaop no nanom no Takao minato, talacowa nawhani caay kahaydaen ko takaraway yosang, nika o sapisalofaw a faloco' ato sakalaheciaw, kafoaen no kafa'eday ci Yamagata Kaname. ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãNanoya patoroden ni Yamagata Kaname to tosaay dademaken ci Yada Yuichi: sarakat, papikilimen to pakayraan no nanomay pisadingki; roma sato , misolap to Cuosoy 'alo to sakanga'ay sapananom to omah a 'acer. Nanoya, ci Yada Yuichi mikerid to kapot tayra toya maledefay no kadadengaan no lifong a lotok misolap, miteka patireng to ta'angay tayal a Ciayi Taynan a ciris. Satata'akay i Asia, sakatolo tayal no hekal, mata'elif ko 10 mihecaan romi'ad ta malaheci ‚ÄãO mimingay adihayay lotok a kanatal ko Taywan. Sadadaya' sanay a kanatal, mamoko' ko 'alo, matono', madasidas ko nanom, nai timol tala 'amis ko lotolotok sakacicawang no nanom, pasiwali ko takaraway lotolotok, orasaka dadaya' ko 'alo no kaetip, masonol ko 'asad saka ira ko masadafdafay a sera. matiya o Ciayi Taynan dafdaf manga'ay ko kaliomahen, o nga'ayay koni. ‚Äã‚ÄãTalacowa, o Ciayi Taynan a dafdaf ko kaitira, dadaya' ko pitedi no cidal to romi'ad, nika kalaorad ko kaciherangan makedal ko kasienawan, caay ka nga'ay ko sapananom to facal, orasaka citodong to "kakarayan ko pi'araw no omah" sanay a ngangan, sasowalen, ano sakaira no pilitod, minengneng ho to pipafeli no karayan a sakaciira. ‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãMasamatira, o Ciayi Taynan a dafdaf ko sakakaay tayal no Taywan sotokufu patireng to suyli a sa'etal. Itiya patodong to "liomahan Taywan, kikayan Dipong" sanay a satao', orasaka Taywan sotokufu mihapiw to "Taywan kapolongan kokyo unka kisiy", oya nano tekedan niyah a pananoman i Ciayi Taynan a dafdaf, palekapoten ko rocok, pakacisataen, palasawad to fangafang, masongila' ko sa'etal a tayal, palacecayen ko citodongay matayalay to demak, o nianan ko parana'an kadadoedo saki Ciayi Taynan a ciris nitayalan. ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãOya ci Yada Yuichi ko mapatoroday misolap patireng a kanga'ayan, malaheci ko pisolap ato sakaira no pakayraan a mikingkiw i, masapinang ni Yada Yuichi i kafafaway no 'alo no Koantien, ira ko nalacolan mimingay nisanga'an no Holan ato Mancin a suyli itiya, orasaka patireng to tata'angay pisopedan to nanom a nga'ayay kaitiraan sato. ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãI 1917 miheca, pasadak ci Yada Yuichi i Taywan sotokufu to "Kuantien 'alo suyli ciris halaka". Nikawrira o todong no yosang ko nihaenan, kalalicayen no laocan no Dipong to nia halaka i, mafo'ot aca no satakaraway citodongay to payso itiya; nika saka tosa miheca ira ko "Kacango'otan no felac" demak, takaraw ko 'aca no felac, macakat to ko li'aca no dafong, macakat ko 'aca no loma', saka masasiwtoc ko finawlan sofo itiya. orasaka, kacangalan sakaira no felac itiya, mihayda to ko sotokufu, i kasasipasasa to kihi a payso, nanoyaan sato ko "Kuantien 'alo suyli ciris halaka" a miteka matayal. ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãI 1920 miheca, o sakalaheci no pisahalaka ato pisafaco to Ciayi Taynan a ciris, miteka to midemak. Itira i kafafaw no Kuantien 'alo patireng to "Usanto satafa'", oya Usanto satafa ato Zhuoshui 'alo ko pananoman, pacomod i nitafa'an piparoan to nanom. Adihay ko 'asad no nanom i Zhuoshui 'alo, nai Cengwen 'alo pialaan, ta patireng to nanomay pisadingki, patireng to dihifay pananoman, awaayay ho manengneng a "salongan suyli satongal" sanay, malitemoh ni Yada Yuichi ko karorayan, mahacecay masalof. ‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãIkor to no 10 miheca, oni a satata'akay no Asia, saka tolo ta'akay no hekal, oya satadamanay kicic pananoman sayho a dopoku, itira i 1930 miheca 4 folad 1 romi'ad malaheci to, o sa'etal no pipananom tangasa aniniay a Taynansi, Ciayisi, Caiyisien, Yinlinsien, nawhani oni a Ciayi Taynan a ciris, polong no Ciayi Taynan dafdaf mapakadofah ko panay, mapaloma ko holaymay, nai 'ayaw no semo'ot no mihecaan mapadipot ko Taywan tangasa anini. Minengneng to kakarayan a omah caay to pinengneng to kakarayan, nai Ciayi Taynan dafdaf a panay mapakaen ko Taywan tamdaw to da'oda'oc. ‚ÄãPaherek ko tayal to Ciayi Taynan a ciris itiya, malinah tayra i Taypi citodong matayal i Taywan sotokofo ci Yada Yuichi, mala citodongay to dopokuka suyliko kakeridan, citodong misolapay to kasa'alo no Taywan, padoedo micowat to suyli pananoman a demak. o nano fana' ningra ato nidemakan, nanoyaan sa mafalic konini a sera. ‚Äã‚ÄãO Ciayi Taynan a ciris, masongila' ko kafalic no Ciayi Taynan dafdaf ko kaliomahan, mapatongal to ko kamaomahan, mafalic ko harer no sera, mapatongal ko nilitodan a panay, malakanga'ayan no maomahay niyaro' ato kasangasaw, macowat ko kicay no Taywan, parapatan ato syakay, masapinang ko caay ko mamalalat a kafiyol. ‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãI 1941 miheca, miteka ko Taypinyang saka tosa lalood no hekal, o sotoko no Dipong pasitimol ko satao', mitatahidang to tadamaanay kicik patayra i Nanyo misolap, oya ci Yada Yuichi orasaka mikalic to 1942 miheca 5 folad 8 romi'ad a Tayyo maru kuruzu tamina, pasayra i Filippin misolap to kanga'ayan kaliomahan, nika oya nikdakawan a tamina mapakotang no timera no Amilika a mateneng, oya ci Yada Yuichi mapatay i papotal riyar no Nakasakiken Koshimashi itiya. oya fafahi sato ci Kome Murahoka Shironushi tadamararom ko faloco' ningra, nanoyaan sa makinapatay itira i Usanto satafa'. ‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãPitademan ca Yada Yuichi aci Kome Murahoka Shironushi itira ka'amis no pifawahan to nanom a mapatireng. ‚Äã‚Äã‚ÄãSin Taywan hepin kikingkay mitliday
S.PHON: == ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi == kapatajan ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ ni ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi mifa…æi ¶aj to~u tajwan a sajƒßo~u no~u …¨~…Æo~upo~uko~u~u ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi , o~u nai isikawa no~u …¨~…Æipo~u≈ã a sajƒßo~u no~u …¨~…Æo~upo~uko~u~u, i **** miƒß…ô ¶aan tajni i tajwan, ¶ito~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ã to~u tajwan so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u a …¨~…Æo~upo~uko~u~upo~u a ki ¶o~u~uso~u~usa itija. nawƒßani ¶ito~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ã ¶i≈ãra misa…æo~uf to~u kasaira no~u …æio~umaƒßan a panano~uman ato~u itiraaj i ¶iaji tajnan a ¶iris, sakama≈ãa °aj ko~u pina…æo~uma panaj no~u ¶iaji tajnan a …¨~…Æaf…¨~…Æaf. o~u nisafa ¶o~uan ni≈ãra, mafa…æi ¶ ko~u …æio~umaƒßan, ta…æiƒßo~u ¶, …¨~…Æo~upo~uko~u~u a taja…æ, ≈ãa…æ…ôf o~u tataparan n…ô≈ãn…ô≈ãan no~u sjakaj. ta…¨~…Æamaanaj no~u …¨~…Æipo~u≈ã tajni ma…æasajƒßo~u no~u …¨~…Æo~upo~uko~u~u, pa…¨~…Æama mi ¶o~uwat to~u so~u~uj…æi no~u tajwan *maso~ufo~u ¶ i no~u isikawakin kawakitako~u~un ima ¶o~uso~un (aniniaj kana*awasi imama ¶i) mao~umaƒßaj …æa…æo~uma °an, o~u saka…æa…æima a wawa to~u fa °inajan ¶i ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi. miti…æi…¨~…Æ i to~ukjo~u tiko~uko~u~u …¨~…Æajkako~u~u rikako~u~upo~u~u ko~ukako~u~upo~u~u …¨~…Æo~upo~uko~u~u ko~ukako~u~uka, itira i, ma…æit…ômo~uƒß ni≈ãra ko~u sakafijo~u…æ no~u °o~urip a si≈ãsi, itira i …¨~…Æipo~u≈ã ira ko~u "ko~uwanko~ukako~u~u no~u ¶i ¶i" fa≈ã ¶a…æaj ≈ãa≈ãan ¶i ƒßiro~ui isami . mat…ô≈ãi…æ ƒßo~u ni≈ãra ko~u sajƒßo~u no~u …¨~…Æo~upo~uko~u~u ¶i ao~ujamasƒßi ma…æa …¨~…Æo~upo~uko~u~u a ¶i…æis no~u panama ¶…ô ¶aj miso~u…æapaj no~u …¨~…Æipo~u≈ã, o~u kak…ôri…¨~…Æan miso~u…æapaj a taja…æ. **o~u pifijo~u…æ no~una tato~usaaj i, nai **** miƒßƒß…ô ¶a pisawa…¨~…Æ ni ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi, man…ô≈ãn…ô≈ã ko~u piki…æim no~u …¨~…Æipo~u≈ã so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u to~u sajƒßo~u no~u …¨~…Æo~upo~uko~u~u tajra m ¶o~uwat to~u tajwan, saka makaƒßi ¶i≈ãra makanir tajra i tajwan. ***iko~ur no~u katajra ni≈ãra i tajwan to~u * miƒß…ô ¶a, ma ¶akat ma…æa ki ¶o~u~uso~u~usa ¶i ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi. °ajaw no~uni pa…¨~…Æ…ôt…ô≈ã ¶i≈ãra miki…æim to~u sapisa…æo~uf to~u …æijo~uk kanao~up no~u nano~um no~u takao~u minato~u, ta…æa ¶o~uwa nawƒßani ¶aaj kaƒßaj…¨~…Æa…ôn ko~u takarawaj jo~usa≈ã, nika o~u sapisa…æo~ufaw a fa…æo~u ¶o~u ° ato~u saka…æaƒß…ô ¶iaw, kafo~ua…ôn no~u kafa °…ô…¨~…Æaj ¶i jama*ata kanam…ô. ****nano~uja pato~uro~u…¨~…Æ…ôn ni jama*ata kanam…ô to~u to~usaaj …¨~…Æa…¨~…Æ…ômak…ôn ¶i ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi: sarakat, papiki…æim…ôn to~u pakajraan no~u nano~umaj pisa…¨~…Æi≈ãki; ro~uma sato~u , miso~u…æap to~u ¶o~u~uo~uso~uj °a…æo~u to~u saka≈ãa °aj sapanano~um to~u o~umaƒß a °a ¶…ôr. nano~uja, ¶i ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi mik…ôri…¨~…Æ to~u kapo~ut tajra to~uja ma…æ…ô…¨~…Æ…ôfaj no~u ka…¨~…Æa…¨~…Æ…ô≈ãaan no~u …æifo~u≈ã a …æo~uto~uk miso~u…æap, mit…ôka patir…ô≈ã to~u ta °a≈ãaj taja…æ a ¶iaji tajnan a ¶iris. satata °akaj i asia, sakato~u…æo~u taja…æ no~u ƒß…ôka…æ, mata °…ô…æif ko~u ** miƒß…ô ¶aan ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ ta ma…æaƒß…ô ¶i *o~u mimi≈ãaj a…¨~…Æiƒßajaj …æo~uto~uk a kanata…æ ko~u tajwan. sa…¨~…Æa…¨~…Æaja ° sanaj a kanata…æ, mamo~uko~u ° ko~u °a…æo~u, mato~uno~u °, ma…¨~…Æasi…¨~…Æas ko~u nano~um, nai timo~u…æ ta…æa °amis ko~u …æo~uto~u…æo~uto~uk saka ¶i ¶awa≈ã no~u nano~um, pasiwa…æi ko~u takarawaj …æo~uto~u…æo~uto~uk, o~urasaka …¨~…Æa…¨~…Æaja ° ko~u °a…æo~u no~u ka…ôtip, maso~uno~u…æ ko~u °asa…¨~…Æ saka ira ko~u masa…¨~…Æaf…¨~…Æafaj a s…ôra. matija o~u ¶iaji tajnan …¨~…Æaf…¨~…Æaf ma≈ãa °aj ko~u ka…æio~umaƒß…ôn, o~u ≈ãa °ajaj ko~uni. **ta…æa ¶o~uwa, o~u ¶iaji tajnan a …¨~…Æaf…¨~…Æaf ko~u kaitira, …¨~…Æa…¨~…Æaja ° ko~u pit…ô…¨~…Æi no~u ¶i…¨~…Æa…æ to~u ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ, nika ka…æao~ura…¨~…Æ ko~u ka ¶iƒß…ôra≈ãan mak…ô…¨~…Æa…æ ko~u kasi…ônawan, ¶aaj ka ≈ãa °aj ko~u sapanano~um to~u fa ¶a…æ, o~urasaka ¶ito~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ã to~u "kakarajan ko~u pi °araw no~u o~umaƒß" sanaj a ≈ãa≈ãan, saso~uwa…æ…ôn, ano~u sakaira no~u pi…æito~u…¨~…Æ, min…ô≈ãn…ô≈ã ƒßo~u to~u pipaf…ô…æi no~u karajan a saka ¶iira. ***masamatira, o~u ¶iaji tajnan a …¨~…Æaf…¨~…Æaf ko~u sakakaaj taja…æ no~u tajwan so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u patir…ô≈ã to~u so~u~uj…æi a sa °…ôta…æ. itija pato~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ã to~u "…æio~umaƒßan tajwan, kikajan …¨~…Æipo~u≈ã" sanaj a satao~u °, o~urasaka tajwan so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u miƒßapiw to~u "tajwan kapo~u…æo~u≈ãan ko~ukjo~u o~u~unka kisij", o~uja nano~u t…ôk…ô…¨~…Æan nijaƒß a panano~uman i ¶iaji tajnan a …¨~…Æaf…¨~…Æaf, pa…æ…ôkapo~ut…ôn ko~u ro~u ¶o~uk, paka ¶isata…ôn, pa…æasawa…¨~…Æ to~u fa≈ãafa≈ã, maso~u≈ãi…æa ° ko~u sa °…ôta…æ a taja…æ, pa…æa ¶…ô ¶aj…ôn ko~u ¶ito~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ãaj mataja…æaj to~u …¨~…Æ…ômak, o~u nianan ko~u parana °an ka…¨~…Æa…¨~…Æo~u…ô…¨~…Æo~u saki ¶iaji tajnan a ¶iris nitaja…æan. ****o~uja ¶i ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi ko~u mapato~uro~u…¨~…Æaj miso~u…æap patir…ô≈ã a ka≈ãa °ajan, ma…æaƒß…ô ¶i ko~u piso~u…æap ato~u sakaira no~u pakajraan a miki≈ãkiw i, masapina≈ã ni ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi i kafafawaj no~u °a…æo~u no~u ko~uanti…ôn, ira ko~u na…æa ¶o~u…æan mimi≈ãaj nisa≈ãa °an no~u ƒßo~u…æan ato~u man ¶in a so~u~uj…æi itija, o~urasaka patir…ô≈ã to~u tata °a≈ãaj piso~up…ô…¨~…Æan to~u nano~um a ≈ãa °ajaj kaitiraan sato~u. *****i **** miƒß…ô ¶a, pasa…¨~…Æak ¶i ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi i tajwan so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u to~u "ko~u~uanti…ôn °a…æo~u so~u~uj…æi ¶iris ƒßa…æaka". nikawrira o~u to~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ã no~u jo~usa≈ã ko~u niƒßa…ônan, ka…æa…æi ¶aj…ôn no~u …æao~u ¶an no~u …¨~…Æipo~u≈ã to~u nia ƒßa…æaka i, mafo~u °o~ut a ¶a no~u satakarawaj ¶ito~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ãaj to~u pajso~u itija; nika saka to~usa miƒß…ô ¶a ira ko~u "ka ¶a≈ão~u °o~utan no~u f…ô…æa ¶" …¨~…Æ…ômak, takaraw ko~u °a ¶a no~u f…ô…æa ¶, ma ¶akat to~u ko~u …æi °a ¶a no~u …¨~…Æafo~u≈ã, ma ¶akat ko~u °a ¶a no~u …æo~uma °, saka masasiwto~u ¶ ko~u finaw…æan so~ufo~u itija. o~urasaka, ka ¶a≈ãa…æan sakaira no~u f…ô…æa ¶ itija, miƒßaj…¨~…Æa to~u ko~u so~uto~uko~u~ufo~u~u, i kasasipasasa to~u kiƒßi a pajso~u, nano~ujaan sato~u ko~u "ko~u~uanti…ôn °a…æo~u so~u~uj…æi ¶iris ƒßa…æaka" a mit…ôka mataja…æ. ******i **** miƒß…ô ¶a, o~u saka…æaƒß…ô ¶i no~u pisaƒßa…æaka ato~u pisafa ¶o~u to~u ¶iaji tajnan a ¶iris, mit…ôka to~u mi…¨~…Æ…ômak. itira i kafafaw no~u ko~u~uanti…ôn °a…æo~u patir…ô≈ã to~u "o~u~usanto~u satafa °", o~uja o~u~usanto~u satafa ato~u *ƒßo~u~uo~usƒßo~u~ui °a…æo~u ko~u panano~uman, pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…Æ i nitafa °an piparo~uan to~u nano~um. a…¨~…Æiƒßaj ko~u °asa…¨~…Æ no~u nano~um i *ƒßo~u~uo~usƒßo~u~ui °a…æo~u, nai ¶…ô≈ãw…ôn °a…æo~u pia…æaan, ta patir…ô≈ã to~u nano~umaj pisa…¨~…Æi≈ãki, patir…ô≈ã to~u …¨~…Æiƒßifaj panano~uman, awaajaj ƒßo~u man…ô≈ãn…ô≈ã a "sa…æo~u≈ãan so~u~uj…æi sato~u≈ãa…æ" sanaj, ma…æit…ômo~uƒß ni ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi ko~u karo~urajan, maƒßa ¶…ô ¶aj masa…æo~uf. *******iko~ur to~u no~u ** miƒß…ô ¶a, o~uni a satata °akaj no~u asia, saka to~u…æo~u ta °akaj no~u ƒß…ôka…æ, o~uja sata…¨~…Æamanaj ki ¶i ¶ panano~uman sajƒßo~u a …¨~…Æo~upo~uko~u~u, itira i **** miƒß…ô ¶a * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ * ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ ma…æaƒß…ô ¶i to~u, o~u sa °…ôta…æ no~u pipanano~um ta≈ãasa aniniaj a tajnansi, ¶iajisi, ¶aijisi…ôn, jin…æinsi…ôn, nawƒßani o~uni a ¶iaji tajnan a ¶iris, po~u…æo~u≈ã no~u ¶iaji tajnan …¨~…Æaf…¨~…Æaf mapaka…¨~…Æo~ufaƒß ko~u panaj, mapa…æo~uma ko~u ƒßo~u…æajmaj, nai °ajaw no~u s…ômo~u °o~ut no~u miƒß…ô ¶aan mapa…¨~…Æipo~ut ko~u tajwan ta≈ãasa anini. min…ô≈ãn…ô≈ã to~u kakarajan a o~umaƒß ¶aaj to~u pin…ô≈ãn…ô≈ã to~u kakarajan, nai ¶iaji tajnan …¨~…Æaf…¨~…Æaf a panaj mapaka…ôn ko~u tajwan tam…¨~…Æaw to~u …¨~…Æa °o~u…¨~…Æa °o~u ¶. *paƒß…ôr…ôk ko~u taja…æ to~u ¶iaji tajnan a ¶iris itija, ma…æinaƒß tajra i tajpi ¶ito~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ã mataja…æ i tajwan so~uto~uko~ufo~u ¶i ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi, ma…æa ¶ito~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ãaj to~u …¨~…Æo~upo~uko~u~uka so~u~uj…æiko~u kak…ôri…¨~…Æan, ¶ito~u…¨~…Æo~u≈ã miso~u…æapaj to~u kasa °a…æo~u no~u tajwan, pa…¨~…Æo~u…ô…¨~…Æo~u mi ¶o~uwat to~u so~u~uj…æi panano~uman a …¨~…Æ…ômak. o~u nano~u fana ° ni≈ãra ato~u ni…¨~…Æ…ômakan, nano~ujaan sa mafa…æi ¶ ko~unini a s…ôra. **o~u ¶iaji tajnan a ¶iris, maso~u≈ãi…æa ° ko~u kafa…æi ¶ no~u ¶iaji tajnan …¨~…Æaf…¨~…Æaf ko~u ka…æio~umaƒßan, mapato~u≈ãa…æ to~u ko~u kamao~umaƒßan, mafa…æi ¶ ko~u ƒßar…ôr no~u s…ôra, mapato~u≈ãa…æ ko~u ni…æito~u…¨~…Æan a panaj, ma…æaka≈ãa °ajan no~u mao~umaƒßaj nijaro~u ° ato~u kasa≈ãasaw, ma ¶o~uwat ko~u ki ¶aj no~u tajwan, parapatan ato~u sjakaj, masapina≈ã ko~u ¶aaj ko~u mama…æa…æat a kafijo~u…æ. ***i **** miƒß…ô ¶a, mit…ôka ko~u tajpinja≈ã saka to~usa …æa…æo~uo~u…¨~…Æ no~u ƒß…ôka…æ, o~u so~uto~uko~u no~u …¨~…Æipo~u≈ã pasitimo~u…æ ko~u satao~u °, mitataƒßi…¨~…Æa≈ã to~u ta…¨~…Æamaanaj ki ¶ik patajra i nanjo~u miso~u…æap, o~uja ¶i ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi o~urasaka mika…æi ¶ to~u **** miƒß…ô ¶a * fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ * ro~umi °a…¨~…Æ a tajjo~u maro~u~u ko~u~uro~u~u*o~u~u tamina, pasajra i fi…æippin miso~u…æap to~u ka≈ãa °ajan ka…æio~umaƒßan, nika o~uja nik…¨~…Æakawan a tamina mapako~uta≈ã no~u tim…ôra no~u ami…æika a mat…ôn…ô≈ã, o~uja ¶i ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi mapataj i papo~uta…æ rijar no~u nakasakik…ôn ko~usƒßimasƒßi itija. o~uja fafaƒßi sato~u ¶i ko~um…ô mo~u~uraƒßo~uka sƒßiro~uno~u~usƒßi ta…¨~…Æamararo~um ko~u fa…æo~u ¶o~u ° ni≈ãra, nano~ujaan sa makinapataj itira i o~u~usanto~u satafa °. ***pita…¨~…Æ…ôman ¶a ja…¨~…Æa jo~u~ui ¶ƒßi a ¶i ko~um…ô mo~u~uraƒßo~uka sƒßiro~uno~u~usƒßi itira ka °amis no~u pifawaƒßan to~u nano~um a mapatir…ô≈ã. ***sin tajwan ƒß…ôpin kiki≈ãkaj mit…æi…¨~…Æaj
